notes: Upon start of game you see the cursor and hear the background music, but just get a black screen, regardless of the window mode (windowed, borderless, or fullscreen). One time I saw the flash of the top left half a logo very briefly, but instantly went away. Tried Proton 4.2 and 4.11 which didn't work. Wouldn't even boot on proton 3.X
title: AI: The Somnium Files

notes: Launcher works but game gets stuck on loading screen. Occasionally will make it to the main menu after a few minutes but attempting to play the game or change options results in another endless loading screen. D3D11 seems to increase the chances it will get to the main menu.
title: AI: The Somnium Files

notes: Requires Media Foundation (see https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install for a simple install script) but otherwise appears to run as smoothly as on Windows. Played for roughly an hour including investigations, cutscenes, and psync sequences. Runs in borderless, windowed, or fullscreen mode without apparent issues; most of the testing was done in borderless.

title: AI: The Somnium Files

notes: Using Media Foundation for Wine (https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install) works fine. I installed wine, then ran the command suggested on github. Fullscreen mode  is flawless.
title: AI: The Somnium Files

notes: Installing MF and enabling Vsync got me past the title screen, new file, and language select, but the game freezes on the opening cutscene after about a second.
title: AI: The Somnium Files

notes: Runs well with the Media Foundation fix, however it does crash occasionally, and sometimes AI-sight will fail to load leaving you stuck, but saving and reloading fixes it. Cutscenes also cause problems but likewise work after a few reloads, or just waiting for them to end. Everything else works as it should.
